title: Personal Website
description: The website you are on right now! A personal site built with React, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS. It features a blog, project showcase, and a contact form. The content is managed through a custom Node.js CLI.

title: PEMonitor
description: Processor & Excursion Monitor: A real-time hardware monitoring dashboard and alert logger. It scrapes data from LibreHardwareMonitor on Windows, providing a web interface and a log that records critical hardware events.
